basicDetails.implementingAgency: Govind Ballabh Pant University Of Agriculture And Technology, Pantnagar

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The "Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000/- (UG Students Only)" scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide tuition fee concessions to students enrolled in 3-year undergraduate programs and 4-year veterinary programs.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, tuition fee concessions (Freeship Tuition Fees) are provided to eligible students.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide tuition fee concessions to students enrolled in 3-year undergraduate programs and 4-year veterinary programs. Through this scheme, tuition fee concessions are provided to students in higher years of study whose tuition fees are less than ₹1,00,000/-.

children.text: The "Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000/- (UG Students Only)" scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide tuition fee concessions to students enrolled in 3-year undergraduate programs and 4-year veterinary programs.
Under this scheme, tuition fee concessions (Freeship Tuition Fees) are provided to eligible students.

First, applications are invited from students using the prescribed form. Based on the applications received, the Dean of Student Welfare prepares a list of students following the prescribed procedure. This list is then approved by the Registrar and the Vice-Chancellor. The Dean of Student Welfare issues an office order announcing the selected students, who are subsequently granted tuition fee concessions.

applicationProcess.process_md: First, applications are invited from students using the prescribed form. Based on the applications received, the Dean of Student Welfare prepares a list of students following the prescribed procedure. This list is then approved by the Registrar and the Vice-Chancellor. The Dean of Student Welfare issues an office order announcing the selected students, who are subsequently granted tuition fee concessions.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a student. 1. The applicant must be enrolled in a 3-year undergraduate program or a 4-year veterinary program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.

children.text: The applicant must be a student.
The applicant must be enrolled in a 3-year undergraduate program or a 4-year veterinary program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
